BoothBooking.title: Booth Booking
BoothBooking.description: Information about a company booking a booth at the expo.

contactName.description: The name of the contact person.

phone.description: The phone number of the contact person.

boothId.description: The ID of the booth being booked.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the booking was created.

VisitorRegistration.title: Visitor Registration
VisitorRegistration.description: Information about a visitor registering for the expo.

firstName.description: The first name of the visitor.

lastName.description: The last name of the visitor.

phone.description: The phone number of the visitor.

email.description: The email address of the visitor.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the registration was created.
